file: 945_Kumar 等 - 2024 - Engineered Ru on HY zeolite catalyst for continuous and selective hydrodeoxygenation of lignin pheno.txt

experiments.description: 在连续固定床反应器中，使用改性催化剂Ru-HY-60-MI，在180°C和1 MPa的温和条件下，将愈创木酚连续选择性加氢脱氧转化为环烷烃（主要是环己烷）。
experiments.text_snippet: The modified catalyst (Ru-HY-60-MI) was tested in a continuous fixed bed reactor, resulting in increased HDO conversion of guaiacol to cycloalkanes... Pressure, temperature, and weight hourly space velocity-dependent tests validate guaiacol HDO over Ru-HY-60-MI catalyzed ring hydrogenation of guaiacol to 2-methoxycyclohexanol, acid-catalyzed demethoxylation and dehydration to cyclohexene, and further hydrogenation of cyclohexene to cyclohexane.

Catalyst composition.original: Ru-HY-60-MI (2 wt% Ru on 60% HY zeolite with 40% inert material, modified impregnation with citric acid)

Flow rate.original: Weight Hourly Space Velocity (WHSV) of 1 h⁻¹

Reaction time.value: Continuous process, time on stream data up to several hours
Reaction time.original: Continuous process, time on stream data up to several hours

Product yield.original: 88.6 wt% liquid yield for guaiacol HDO

Catalyst stability.value: Stable over entire time on stream with complete conversion and no deactivation
Catalyst stability.original: Stable over entire time on stream with complete conversion and no deactivation
